title: × vandaenopsis bultelii
intro: × Vandaenopsis bultelii, also known as Vanda × Coelogyne, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of × Vandaenopsis bultelii include relieving coughs and congestion, reducing inflammation, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
